roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PROGRESS REPORT RE:18 HRS HARM REDUCTION CLASSES/X:5 OF 18 HOURS COMPLETE/X:DEFENDANT NEEDS TO PROVIDE PROOF OF CLASSES AT NEXT COURT DATE/CONT/DOPU:PROOF FROM DEFENSE COUNSEL/

/CAL SENTENCE/TWS/CH5 ISS PROB 2 Y PJ 37 D/CTS 37/CTORD DEFENDANT SHALL PARTICIPATE IN 18 HOURS IN HARM REDUCTION CLASSES THOUGH THE CASC/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON ELECTRONIC MONITORINGBY THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE FOR A PERIOD OF 30 DAYS AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY APD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD: IF, AFTER 30 DAYS OF NOT VIOLATING ANY TERM OF HIS PROBATION, THE DEFENSE MAY, WITH PROPER FILINGOF A MOTION, GET HIS FORMAL PROBATION CONVERTED TO INFORMAL PROBATION/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/SA1:JERRIA FAIRLEYVISTE/SA2:64 TURK ST, SF CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/30    CAPD PPRF REPORT, DOP/PPRF/PPRFRPT:10-19-20/CONTD:PPRF COMPLIANCE REPORT FROM ADULT PROBATION IN DEPARTMENT 30 & POSSIBLE DEFENSE MOTION TO CONVERT FORMAL PROBATION TO INFORMAL PROBATION/DOP/
